name: Mo'Nique
bio: Monique is an American stand-up comedian and actress from Baltimore whose bold, larger-than-life comedy centers on body image, relationships, family, and the lives of Black women. She rose through the BET and Showtime circuit and headlined The Queens of Comedy tour, then crossed into mainstream television and film. She won the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actress for Precious and later returned to stand-up with the Netflix special My Name Is Monique.

timeline.ev: Begins stand-up after an open-mic dare in Baltimore
Begins starring role on the UPN sitcom The Parkers
Headlines The Queens of Comedy tour and Showtime special
Releases the special I Coulda Been Your Cellmate
Wins the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actress for Precious
Releases the Netflix special My Name Is Monique

accolades: Academy Award for Best Supporting Actress for Precious (2009)
Four NAACP Image Awards for The Parkers
Grammy Award nomination for Best Comedy Album (2002)
